game_info.title: Balatro Lite
game_info.concept:
Welcome to the official Balatro mobile game!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/balatro/id6502453075

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Welcome to the official Balatro mobile game!

Hypnotic and endlessly satisfying, Balatro is a magical mix of card games like Solitaire and Poker, that lets you twist the rules in ways never seen before!

Your goal is to beat the Boss Blinds by making strong poker hands.

Find new Jokers that change the game and create awesome and exciting combos! Win enough chips to beat tricky bosses, and find hidden bonus hands and decks as you play. You’ll need all the help you can get to beat the big boss, win the final challenge, and win the game.

Features:

* Remastered controls for touch screen devices.
* Each run is different: every pick-up, discard and joker can dramatically alter the course of your run.
* Multiple game items: discover over 150 Jokers, each with special powers. Use them with different decks,upgrade cards and vouchers to boost your scores.
* Different Game modes: Campaign mode and challenge mode for you to play.
* Beautiful Pixel Art: Immerse yourself in the CRT fuzz and enjoy detailed, hand-crafted pixel art.
game_info.description: Balatro Lite is a poker-themed roguelike deck-builder. Your goal is to defeat a series of "Blinds" (score targets) by playing illegal poker hands. Combine valid poker hands with special Joker cards that modify your scoring multipliers and chips. Manage your money to buy powerful Jokers and Planet cards in the shop between rounds. Survive 8 Antes to win!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Navigate cards in Hand or items in Shop
- Space: Select/Deselect card to play/discard; Buy item in Shop
- Arrow Up: PLAY selected hand (must be a valid poker hand of 1-5 cards)
- Arrow Down: DISCARD selected cards (uses a Discard)
- Z: Sort hand by Rank or Suit / Skip Blind in Shop
- Shift: Sell selected Joker (in Shop only)
- Enter: Start Game / Next Round (in Shop)
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Survival Test. The agent attempts to play the game by randomly selecting valid cards and playing them to verify the game loop and scoring mechanics function without crashing.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly select 1 to 5 cards. Attempt to Play. If that fails (invalid hand), Discard. If in Shop, randomly buy items or proceed.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should progress through at least one Blind, score points, and correctly transition between Hand and Shop phases, or Game Over gracefully if score is insufficient.

TEST_2.test_description: High Score Strategy Test. The agent attempts to win by identifying and playing the strongest available poker hand (e.g., Flush, Straight, Three of a Kind).
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze hand for best poker combination. Select those cards. Play Hand. Prioritize buying Jokers in Shop. Aim to clear Ante 1.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The agent should consistently score higher than random chance, beating early Blinds and demonstrating that the scoring logic correctly rewards better hands.
